title: Spicy Silky Vegan Irish Potato Stir-fry
description: This tangy and silky vegan Irish dish features a blend of cider and whisk to create a spicy-savory sauce that complements the creamy mashed potatoes, making it perfect for weeknight dinners.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: or vegan butter for a dairy-free option

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup whisked plant-based milk or cream (such as almond or soy milk with a thickener like cornstarch)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
Fresh parsley or dill for garnish (optional)

instructions: Boil the potatoes in salted water until tender. Drain and mash with a little vegetable broth.
Meanwhile, heat olive oil (or vegan butter) in a wok over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté for about 2 minutes or until fragrant.
If using, add red pepper and cook for an additional minute. Stir in cider vinegar, whisked plant-based milk, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper.
Slowly pour the hot mash into the wok with the sauce mixture, stirring continuously to avoid lumping. Bring back to a simmer and let it thicken slightly by cooking for about 5-7 minutes.
Serve immediately garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
